radiusKm.description: Radius in km for proximity search (default: 30)

dateFrom.description: Filter events starting from this date (ISO format)

dateTo.description: Filter events ending before this date (ISO format)

hasTickets.description: Only show events with at least one available ticket

tzOffset.description: User timezone offset in minutes from UTC (e.g. 180 for UTC-3)

Record_string.unknown_.description: Construct a type with a set of properties K of type T

Record_string.any_.description: Construct a type with a set of properties K of type T

Record_string.Record_string.number__.description: Construct a type with a set of properties K of type T

Record_string.never_.description: Construct a type with a set of properties K of type T

whatsappPromptDismissed.description: Whether user dismissed the WhatsApp opt-in prompt

phoneNumber.description: User's phone number in E.164 format

rejectionReason.description: Reason for manual review rejection (if rejected by admin)

canRetryLiveness.description: Whether user can retry liveness (has attempts remaining and is in a retryable state)

documentVerificationCompleted.description: Whether document verification step was completed successfully (text/face detected)

hasDocumentImage.description: Whether document has been uploaded (step 2 completed)

verificationSessionId.description: Session ID for resuming liveness check on another device

ErrorClassName.description:
Union type of all error class names that can be returned by the API.
Used for type-safe error handling on the frontend.

ApiErrorResponse.description:
API Error Response - This is the actual shape returned by the error handler middleware.
Use this type in

timestamp.description: ISO timestamp of when the error occurred

path.description: Request path that caused the error

Pick_Notification.Exclude_keyofNotificat.description: From T, pick a set of properties whose keys are in the union K

Omit_Notification.metadata-or-actions-or.description: Construct a type with the properties of T except for those in type K.

TypedNotificationMetadata_NotificationMe.description:
Typed metadata based on notification type
Extracts the specific metadata type from the discriminated union

Extract_NotificationMetadata._type-Notif.description: Extract from T those types that are assignable to U
Extract from T those types that are assignable to U

TypedNotificationMetadata_NotificationTy.description:
Typed metadata based on notification type
Extracts the specific metadata type from the discriminated union

TypedNotification.description:
Typed notification response with parsed metadata and actions
This ensures type safety when reading notifications from the database
Title and description are generated from type + metadata, not stored in DB
For backwards compatibility, uses the generic type

ProcessorSettlementListRow.description: Serialized settlement row for admin APIs / OpenAPI (avoids TSOA issues with `Json` index types).

platformIncomeVatAmount.description:
IVA estimado sobre el ingreso neto plataforma (tasa = platformIncomeVatRate).
Solo aplica si el ingreso neto es positivo.

netPlatformIncomeAfterIncomeVat.description: Ingreso neto plataforma menos platformIncomeVatAmount (estimación post-IVA empresa).

platformIncomeVatRate.description: Tasa usada (0–1), coincide con VAT_RATE del entorno (p. ej. 0.22).

processorFeesPercentOfCommissionAndVat.description:
% del total comisión + IVA (pedido) que representan los fees del procesador.
Denominador: platformCommission + vatOnCommission.

netPlatformIncomePercentOfCommissionAndV.description: % del total comisión + IVA (pedido) que queda como ingreso neto plataforma.

currency.description:
Moneda de liquidación del procesador (`payments.balance_currency`), no la moneda del pedido.
Los importes numéricos del bloque están expresados en esta moneda (GMV/comisión/IVA convertidos con `exchange_rate` cuando aplica).

mixedCurrency.description:
`true` si hay pagos pagados con más de un `balance_currency` en el rango.
Ya no indica solo “pedidos en monedas distintas”: varias monedas de cargo pueden seguir mostrándose como una sola moneda de liquidación.

currency.description: Moneda de cobro del pedido (`orders.currency`). Importes sin conversión.

get.description: Get trending events based on view count in the last N days
Get list of distinct cities for filter dropdown
Get distinct regions with active events, grouped by country
Get event details by slug (public, used by frontend)

post.description: Track a view for an event by slug (called from route loader on actual navigation)
Track a view for an event (called from route loader on actual navigation, not prefetch)

400.description: Invalid request body, missing required fields, or invalid data types

404.description: Event not found or ticket wave not found

422.description: Validation failed: Cannot create listing for finished event, ticket wave does not belong to event, price exceeds face value, quantity must be greater than 0, or ticket limit exceeded

400.description: No file uploaded or invalid file

401.description: Authentication required or not authorized to upload for this ticket

422.description: Validation failed: ticket not sold, event has ended, invalid file type, or file too large

post.description:
Upload a ticket document

Sellers can upload PDF/image documents for their sold tickets.
Documents must be uploaded before the event ends.

file.description: - Document file (PDF, PNG, JPG, JPEG - max 10MB)

400.description: No file uploaded or invalid file

401.description: Authentication required or not authorized to upload for this ticket

422.description: Validation failed: ticket not sold, event has ended, invalid file type, or file too large

put.description:
Update/replace a ticket document

Uploads a new version of the document. Previous versions are kept for audit trail.
Can only update before the event ends.

file.description: - New document file (PDF, PNG, JPG, JPEG - max 10MB)

401.description: Authentication required or not authorized to modify this ticket

422.description: Validation failed: ticket not active, event has ended, or price exceeds face value

put.description:
Update ticket price

Only active tickets (not reserved, sold, or cancelled) can have their price updated.
Price cannot exceed the ticket wave face value.

requestBody.description: - Request body containing the new price

schema.description: - Request body containing the new price

401.description: Authentication required or not authorized to modify this ticket

422.description: Validation failed: ticket not active or event has ended

delete.description:
Remove a ticket from listing

Only active tickets (not reserved, sold, or cancelled) can be removed.
This performs a soft delete (sets deletedAt timestamp).

parameters.description: - ID of the ticket to remove
parameters.name: ticketId

401.description: Authentication required or not authorized to view this ticket

get.description:
Get ticket information with document details

Returns ticket info including document URL for viewing.
Only the seller (ticket publisher) can access this endpoint.

post.description:
DEV ONLY — Send a test push notification to all user's subscribed devices.
Removed before production deployment.

DEV ONLY — Create a test in-app notification for the current user.
Goes through the full notification pipeline so it's picked up by polling.

422.description: Validation failed: Invalid document number, document already verified, or country required for passports

post.description:
Initiate identity verification process

User provides document type, number, and country (for passports).
System validates the document format and checks for duplicates.

422.description: Validation failed: Invalid face detection or document number not detected

post.description:
Verify document (upload document photo only)

Processes uploaded document image:
- Extracts text from document
- Detects face in document
- Validates document number
- Determines if manual review is needed

Face comparison will happen during liveness check using the liveness reference image

422.description: Document verification required or user not found

post.description:
Start liveness check session

Creates an AWS Rekognition Face Liveness session for the user.
Returns session ID and region for the frontend to complete the check.

422.description: Validation failed: Liveness check failed or low confidence

post.description:
Verify liveness results

Processes the results of the liveness check:
- Validates liveness confidence
- Determines if verification is complete or requires manual review
- Updates user verification status

get.description:
Get temporary AWS credentials for Face Liveness SDK

The backend assumes a minimal IAM role that can ONLY call StartFaceLivenessSession.
This is more secure than Cognito because credentials are only given to authenticated users.
Credentials expire in 15 minutes.
